name: Godwin Edgar Opuka
summary: Full-Stack Developer, Solutions Architect, and AI/ML Engineer with a strong record of owning end-to-end delivery of production-grade platforms — from Stellar-powered cross-border payment systems and AI-native ERPs to autonomous trading agents and legal knowledge graphs. Currently building Afripay, a borderless remittance platform at Zamadi Group, where I also lead DevOps and built the company's Learning Management System. MSc Financial Engineering candidate at WorldQuant University bridging quantitative finance and applied AI.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Lead engineer on Afripay — Zamadi's flagship borderless remittance and cross-border payment platform using the Stellar Network for settlement across multiple African currencies

Engineered the full-stack architecture: FastAPI backend, double-entry immutable ledger, JWT/refresh-token auth, Nginx rate limiting, React 19 admin workspace, and Flutter mobile app (Riverpod state management)
Integrated Onfido for 3-tier KYC/AML verification and built the FIAT-to-USDT settlement engine via Stellar Network

Built and deployed the NYS Virtual Campus — a full Learning Management System for the National Youth Service Kenya with role-based access for students, tutors, and administrators (React 18, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM)
Own all DevOps: CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerisation, infrastructure provisioning, and deployment management across all Zamadi Group products

experience.title: Solutions Architect & BI Lead
bullets: Architecting the Twin Graph Manager — a graph-powered digital business platform modeling enterprise digital twins using Neo4j and graph data science
Designing full-stack platform: Neo4j graph backend, GraphQL/REST API layer, Redux state management, React component-driven frontend with MACH-aligned architecture
Architecting a Digital Intelligence & Analytics solution delivering descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, and prescriptive intelligence capabilities
Built graph-based intelligence solutions using Neo4j; oversaw enterprise architecture modeling via Ardoq and Abacus
Directed AI agent deployment for business process automation; orchestrated migration of Power BI dashboards to React-based solutions

experience.title: Full-Stack Data Developer | AI/ML Engineer
bullets: Engineered end-to-end data pipelines using Python, R, Spark, and Microsoft Fabric
Developed and deployed ML-powered services with REST and GraphQL endpoints including React frontend integration
Designed feature engineering pipelines for predictive analytics and AI-driven products
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines for data, ML, and application workloads using Azure DevOps

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Delivered quantitative and qualitative analytical solutions across finance and business domains
Conducted financial statement analysis and hypothesis testing using robust statistical methods
Generated actionable insights through advanced data modeling and research methodologies

experience.title: Claims Analyst (Intern)
bullets: Supported claims processing and actuarial analysis in insurance operations

experience.title: Asset Management Analyst (Intern)
bullets: Supported asset tracking and management reporting

experience.title: Business Development Associate (Intern)
bullets: Supported business development and client engagement

projects.name: Afripay — Borderless Remittance Platform
projects.description: Institutional-grade cross-border payment and digital wallet platform supporting 8+ African currencies. Features a Stellar Network settlement engine, double-entry immutable ledger, Onfido KYC/AML, React 19 admin workspace, and Flutter mobile app.

projects.name: NYS Virtual Campus — Learning Management System
projects.description: Full-stack LMS for the National Youth Service Kenya. Role-based access for students, tutors, and administrators. Course management, assignment tracking, grading, and analytics.

projects.name: AMD EA Strategy Optimizer — AMD Developer Hackathon 2026
projects.description: AMD Developer Hackathon 2026 (Track 1 — AI Agents & Agentic Workflows). AI-powered Enterprise Architecture platform that transforms business goals into governance-grounded, Jira-ready strategic roadmaps. Powered by AMD Instinct MI300X running Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct via vLLM, a 1,416-capability Neo4j knowledge graph, Deep Reinforcement Learning (REINFORCE policy gradient) prioritisation, and a self-correcting LangGraph agentic pipeline with compliance verification loop.

projects.name: GraphAlpha — Autonomous xStocks Trading Agent
projects.description: WQU MScFE capstone. Production-grade agentic trading system grounded in a 324-concept financial knowledge graph (Memgraph). Five-agent pipeline: RegimeAgent, SignalAgent, RiskAgent, ExecutionAgent, ResearchAgent. GARCH(1,1) volatility, Half-Kelly position sizing, VaR enforcement, and Kraken xStocks execution.

projects.name: Agentic ERP — AI-Native Enterprise Platform
projects.description: Full-stack AI-native ERP in Go. Agent loop replaces form-driven workflows — users describe intent in natural language, AI selects the correct ERP tool, drafts actions for human approval. Modules: GL/AP/AR, HR, CRM, Supply Chain, Project Management. Ships as both web (Next.js 15) and desktop app (Wails v3).

projects.name: Kenya Legal AI — Knowledge Graph & Fine-Tuning Pipeline
projects.description: Ingests the Constitution of Kenya 2010 and statutory law into a Neo4j knowledge graph. Fine-tunes Mistral-7B via QLoRA on the graph data. GraphRAG retrieval with constitutional anchoring — every statute traceable to its constitutional basis via DERIVES_AUTHORITY_FROM relationships.

projects.name: Job Hunter KE — Automated Job Application SaaS
projects.description: Automated job and scholarship application platform for the Kenyan market. Scrapes listings from 10+ boards, generates tailored CVs and cover letters using Groq/LLaMA, routes through n8n workflows for review and dispatch via Gmail.

technical: Machine Learning Pipelines, LangGraph, AI Agents
Stochastic Calculus, Derivative Pricing, Monte Carlo

education.notes: Coursework: Financial Data, Derivative Pricing, Stochastic Modeling, ML in Finance, Deep Learning for Finance, Financial Econometrics. Currently: Portfolio Management. Remaining: Risk Management, Capstone (GraphAlpha).

education.institution: Jomo Kenyatta University of Agriculture and Technology (JKUAT)
education.notes: Stochastic Calculus, Derivative Pricing, Game Theory, Statistical Inference, Numerical Methods.

notable_achievements: Built and deployed Afripay — a live Stellar-powered cross-border payment platform serving multiple African currencies
AMD Developer Hackathon 2026 entrant: built an EA Strategy Optimizer running Qwen2.5-72B on AMD MI300X with a 1,416-capability knowledge graph and DRL prioritisation
Promoted from Full-Stack Data Developer to Solutions Architect & BI Lead at DigitalQatalyst within 3 months
WQU MScFE capstone: GraphAlpha autonomous trading agent grounded in a 324-concept financial knowledge graph
Sole engineer for all Zamadi Group DevOps and infrastructure
